keyMappings:
unmap t
map A visitPreviousTab
map \ passNextKey
map tt createTab
map tp togglePinTab
map tm toggleMuteTab
searchEngines:
# General 
w: https://www.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Search&search=%s Wikipedia
g: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s Google
l: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s&btnI I'm feeling lucky...
y: https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=%s Youtube
gm: https://www.google.com/maps?q=%s Google maps
b: https://www.bing.com/search?q=%s Bing
d: https://duckduckgo.com/?q=%s DuckDuckGo
az: https://www.amazon.com/s/?field-keywords=%s
qw: https://www.qwant.com/?q=%s Qwant

# Technical Documentation & Code
so: https://stackoverflow.com/search?q=%s StackOverflow
gh: https://github.com/search?q=%s GitHub
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/search?q=%s NPM
mdn: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/search?q=%s MDN Web Docs

# Creative Coding Frameworks
p5: https://www.google.com/search?q=site:p5js.org/reference+%s p5.js Reference
three: https://threejs.org/docs/index.html?q=%s Three.js Docs
unity: https://docs.unity3d.com/Manual/30_search.html?q=%s Unity Docs

# Design Inspiration
pi: https://www.pinterest.com/search/pins/?q=%s Pinterest
dr: https://dribbble.com/search/%s Dribbble
be: https://www.behance.net/search?search=%s Behance
save: https://savee.it/search/?q=%s Savee.it (Highly curated for designers)
arena: https://www.are.na/search/%s Are.na

# Images
ep: https://www.everypixel.com/search?q=%s Everypixel
ov: https://openverse.org/search/?q=%s Openverse

# GIFs
gi: https://giphy.com/search/%s Giphy

# Videos
v: https://vimeo.com/search?q=%s Vimeo

# Fonts & Colors
gf: https://fonts.google.com/?query=%s Google Fonts
cl: http://www.colourlovers.com/palettes/search?query=%s ColourLovers

# Icons & Illustrations
ic: https://icon-sets.iconify.design/?query=%s Iconify
ill: https://www.google.com/search?q=%s+(site:undraw.co+OR+site:drawkit.com+OR+site:getillustrations.com+OR+site:storyset.com+OR+site:humaaans.com+OR+site:absurd.design)

# Motions
lottie: https://lottiefiles.com/search?q=%s

# 3D
3d: https://sketchfab.com/search?q=%s&type=models&features=downloadable
ph: https://polyhaven.com/models?s=%s

# Hardware & Components
ma: https://www.mcmaster.com/%s McMaster-Carr (Fasteners/Parts)
ada: https://www.adafruit.com/search?q=%s Adafruit
sf: https://www.sparkfun.com/search/results?term=%s SparkFun
mous: https://www.mouser.com/Search/Refine?Keyword=%s Mouser

# Math & Logic
wa: https://www.wolframalpha.com/input/?i=%s WolframAlpha
sh: https://www.shadertoy.com/results?query=%s Shadertoy (Logic/Math examples)

# General Knowledge/Research
scholar: https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%s Google Scholar
